# The Beauty Temple

A modern beauty salon in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India.

## Services
Haircut & styling, hair spa, hair smoothening, hair color, facial treatment,
bleach & skin care, manicure & pedicure, waxing & hair removal, threading,
party makeup, bridal & engagement makeup.

## Location
151, Bhamasha Marg, Tirupati Balaji Nagar, Sector 8, Sector 6, Pratap Nagar,
Jaipur, Rajasthan 302033, India.

## Hours
Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM.

## Contact
Phone: +91 9875758280
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919875758280

## Areas served
Pratap Nagar, Sector 6, Sector 8, Tirupati Balaji Nagar, Bhamasha Marg,
Sanganer and nearby Jaipur localities.
